## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem or use case

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the ideal outcome from a user perspective.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or alternative approaches have you already considered?

## Additional context

Add examples, CLI sketches, related tools, or sample workflows if useful.
